gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/188)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/188)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّ لِكُلِّ ثَمَرَةٍ سَمّاً فَإِذَا أَتَيْتُمْ بِهَا فَمَسُّوهَا بِالْمَاءِ أَوِ اغْمِسُوهَا فِي الْمَاءِ يَعْنِي اغْسِلُوهَا .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Al Husayn Bin Al Munzar, from the one who mentioned it, from Furat Bin Ahnaf who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘For every fruit there is poison, so whenever you are given it, so wipe it with the water, or immerse it in the water, meaning wash it’.
en.sarwar: 4. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from al-Husayn ibn al-Mundhir from those whom he has mentioned from Furat ibn Ahnaf who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Every fruit has poison. When you get them make them touch the water or immerse them in water, that is, wash them.’”
